name: Bujingi Crane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ハバキリ
desc: During damage calculation (in either player's turn), if a Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control battles an opponent's monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; the ATK of your monster becomes double its original ATK, during that damage calculation only.
mnst_eff: During damage calculation (in either player's turn), if a Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control battles an opponent's monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; the ATK of your monster becomes double its original ATK, during that damage calculation only.
eff: During damage calculation (in either player's turn), if a Beast-Warrior-Type "Bujin" monster you control battles an opponent's monster: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; the ATK of your monster becomes double its original ATK, during that damage calculation only.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
